titleStmt.title: SII 19.47: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 47. (A.R. No. 377 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE MAṆḌAPA IN FRONT OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, VYĀGHRAPĀDĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The inscription is left incomplete. It records an endowment of land at Vilivalam to provide for offerings, etc. and for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tiruppulippagavar at Śiṟṟiṅgūr a brahmadēya in Kurukkai-kūṟṟam a subdivision of Milāḍu. The donor's name is lost.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripanmarkku yāṇṭu mūnṟāvatu malāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu brahmadeyam ciṟṟiṅkūr Uṭaiyār tiruppulipakavarkku tiruvamutupaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭiṉattukku vili valamāṉa Uḷḷūrkku
Ellai kiḻpārkkuellai koṭiyūr Ellaikkum kuṇamalaipāṭi Ellaikkum meṟkkum tenpārkkellai keṭilattukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai malaiyanūr Ellaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai
koṭiyūrellaikku teṟkum Āka Ivvicain=ta nāṟperellaiyu ḷakappaṭṭa ṉilam tirununtā viḷakkoṉṟukkum tiruvamutupaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭinattukkum U
dakapūrvam paṇṇik
Digital edition of SII 19.47 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
